Living with the family are extraordinary pets known as Zhu Zhus, including Pipsqueak, Num Nums, Chunk and Mr. Squiggles. programme.desc: Menyapu Balutan -: Tajuk ini akan membahaskan tentang konsep rukhsah dalam syariat Islam, maksud dan dalil menyapu balutan, cara mengangkat hadas dalam keadaan anggota berwudhuk berbalut.

programme.title: TVP@TTV Pend. Islam Ting. 1 Ep03
programme.desc: Tajuk Makanan Halal Lagi Baik ini membincangkan tentang kita dituntut untuk mengambil makanan yang halal lagi baik. Untuk memperkembangkan lagi topik ini, murid diperjelaskan dengan maksud makanan halal dan makanan haram. Selain itu, topik ini juga menerangkan tentang akibat pengambilan makanan yang haram kepada rohani dan jasmani serta perbezaan ciri-ciri makanan halal dan makanan haram. Di samp

programme.title: TVP@TTV Pend. Syariah Islamiah Ting. 4 Ep02
programme.desc: Rancangan ini membincangkan secara terperinci tentang 3 jenis Akad Tabbaru' dari segi bahasa dan istilah, dalil keharusan akad, rukun dan syarat akad.

programme.title: TVP@TTV Pend. Islam Ting. 4 Ep01
programme.desc: Rancangan ini membincangkan tentang kepentingan berdakwah, kupasan surah Fussilat (surah 41, ayat 33), menyelusuri gelombang dakwah semasa para anbiya hingga kini Tuntutan beramal soleh dan berbangga menjadi muslim turut dibincangkan.

programme.title: TVP@TTV Pend. Islam Ting. 1 Ep02
programme.desc: Topik ini menerangkan tentang pengertian jahiliah. Diperincikan hal kejahilan dalam bidang akidah dan akhlak serta pelbagai pegangan akidah yang dianuti oleh masyarakat jahiliyah. Kejahilan masyarakat Arab ini masih wujud dan ada di antaranya masih diamalkan sehingga sekarang. Murid murid dikehendaki meninggalkan akhlak buruk yang terdapat dalam masyarakat sekarang yang mirip kejahilan masyarakat

The 118 races to help protesters at a slaughter house and a wife who finds herself trapped in a "rage room" with her husband's mistress; Athena takes action after Michael, May and Harry experience a traumatic traffic stop.

Athena and the 118 respond to bizarre emergency calls on Halloween, including a flock of crows terrorizing a field trip, an office employee having a close encounter with an eight-limbed creature and a ghost-like girl wandering a neighborhood.
When a murder weapon from a case close to Athena in the early '90s resurfaces, flashbacks to 1989 show how Athena joined the LAPD and became the police officer she is today.

A skating mishap at an ice show; an accident involving a self-driving car; a fulfillment warehouse robot goes rogue; Eddie's after-hours fight club gets out of control; Hen struggles in her relationship with Karen.

The 118 responds to debris from a meteor shower crashing into an apartment building and a deadly fire caused by a hazardous waste truck crash; Hen struggles with guilt over her ambulance accident; Bobby introduces Eddie to an old friend.

Holiday-themed incidents include a shopper pushed over the edge, a woman who is literally having a "Blue Christmas" and a luggage handler accident on a tarmac; Maddie revisits her past to embrace her future; Bobby receives shocking news.

The 118 responds to a skydiving trip gone wrong; a bank rep is injured in a home repossession; a lovestruck assistant's lunch run ends in disaster; Athena and the family come to terms with Michael's difficult health decision.

programme.title: Orang Kampung Otak Kimia
programme.desc: Orang Kampung Otak Kimia mengisahkan Mr. Os yang mula mendapat perhatian orang kampung apabila beliau berjaya mencipta formula untuk orang bisu bercakap semula.

programme.title: Manap Karaoke
programme.desc: Apabila Manap diperkenalkan kepada keseronokan berkaraoke dan menyedari populariti karaoke adalah hobi kegemaran di bandarnya, dia mendapat idea untuk memulakan perniagaan karaoke bergerak.

programme.title: Gila Gila Pengantin
programme.desc: Aliah seorang gadis yang ingin berkahwin, mempunyai satu phobia dimana dia takut dengan acara perkahwinan itu sendiri setelah apa yang terjadi keatas dirinya semasa dia kecil. Lakonan Erra Fazira.

programme.title: Janji Zehan-Lahzeye Bi Payan
programme.desc: A young newlywed couple, Zehan and Arman, decide to go to Shiraz in Iran for their honeymoon. But soon their fairy tale romance starts to crack as the true meaning of marriage puts their relationship to the test. Starring Nur Fazura and Amir Rezazadeh. Directed by Bernard Chauly.

programme.title: Gemerlapan
programme.desc: Sebuah kisah komedi, sekumpulan pelajar kolej yang saling bersaing untuk cuba memenangi pertandingan nyanyian di kolej mereka.

programme.title: Senario The Movie
programme.desc: Azlee, Wahid & Mazlan adalah 3 sekawan dari kecil. Mereka membesar bersama sehingga membuka rumah hantu terkenal di sebuah funfair dimiliki Apek Saiful.

programme.title: Cun
programme.desc: Kisah Luna seorang pengacara TV popular membawa diri ke sebuah kampung lalu bertemu seorang pemuda kampung bernama Atan lalu jatuh cinta. Lakonan Remy Ishak, Maya Karin, Faezah Elai, Nadiya Nisaa dan Ning Baizura.

programme.title: Kelas Belakang Ep04
programme.desc: Kelas Belakang

programme.title: Nana Tanjung
programme.desc: Nana, seorang balu membesarkan tiga anak perempuan di Penang. Akhbar mencintai Khairunisa tetapi Nana merancang jodoh lain. Mereka cuba meyakinkan Nana, namun Nana mengumumkan pertunangannya.

programme.title: Pisau Cukur
programme.desc: Apa jadi bila mangsa dan pemangsa terperangkap di kapal mewah? Bella & Intan bertembung 3 Datuk, isteri, anak, seorang detektif dan peminat tegar Bella. Siapa mangsa, siapa pemangsa?

programme.title: Keluarga Iskandar The Movie
programme.desc: Filem komedi kekeluargaan mengisahkan kehidupan harian Haji Iskandar, isteri beliau, lima anak mereka dan keluarga masing-masing yang lucu dan huru-hara.

programme.title: Kelas Belakang Ep10
programme.desc: Kelas Belakang

programme.title: Bikin Filem
programme.desc: Seorang bintang filem bercita-cita ingin menjadi produser filem, seorang pengarah yang telah lama menderita dan kru filem dihantui masalah dan berperangai kebudak-budakan semasa merakamkan fillem.

programme.title: Senario The Movie Episod 2 Beach Boys
programme.desc: The Beach Boys - Azlee, Mazlan dan Wahid kembali untuk menyempurnakan misi mereka menyelamatkan sebuah resort yang hampir ditutup.

programme.title: Jutawan Fakir
programme.desc: Kehidupan Fakir Bin Miskin berubah apabila beliau terjumpa sebuah beg penuh berisi duit secara tak sengaja. Lakonan Saiful Apek, Bob KU2, Yasin, Waheeda dan Imuda.

programme.title: Mami Jarum
programme.desc: Kisah Mami yang suka mencucuk jarum, mengumpat dan membawa cerita akhirnya terkena pada batang hidung sendiri. Dibintangi oleh Kartina Aziz, Rita Rudaini, Vanidah Imran dan Rosnah Mat Aris.

programme.title: Nana Tanjung
programme.desc: Nana, seorang balu membesarkan tiga anak perempuan di Penang. Akhbar mencintai Khairunisa tetapi Nana merancang jodoh lain. Mereka cuba meyakinkan Nana, namun Nana mengumumkan pertunangannya.

programme.title: Puteri Impian
programme.desc: Impian Nora, seorang gadis kilang menjadi puteri raja menjadi kenyataan apabila memenangi peraduan yang dianjurkan stesen TV. Lakonan Amy Mastura

programme.title: Kampong Pisang Musikal Raya Istimewa
programme.desc: Penduduk Kampong Pisang bekerjasama untuk persiapan jamuan Raya ketika huru-hara melanda penduduk kampung itu. Adakah rancangan mereka untuk sambutan raya itu berjaya?

programme.title: 5 Minit
programme.desc: A young father, who had his daughter out of wedlock, relives his misspent youth while waiting the infinite 5 minutes to find out whether his own teenage, unmarried daughter is now pregnant.

programme.title: Walid - Trailer
programme.desc: Walid, tokoh berpengaruh yang disanjung, di sebalik wajah menyimpan rahsia. Apabila kebenaran terbongkar, kepercayaan hancur dan kuasa mula runtuh. Siapakah Walid sebenarnya?

programme.title: Sesaat Lebih - Trailer
programme.desc: Mengisahkan Adelia, seorang wanita berkerjaya yang kehilangan suami secara mengejut, lalu berusaha sembuh bersama anaknya dan sahabat baik arwah, menemui makna cinta dan peluang kedua dalam hidup hari ini.

programme.title: Karya 12-Eropah, Here I Am
programme.desc: Bukhary membawa diri ke Pulau Leros, Greece dan menjadi sukarelawan membantu pelarian Syiria. Di situ dia mempelajari nilai kehidupan dan kemanusiaan.

programme.title: Kampung Latah Kena Kuarantin
programme.desc: Ajin adalah pekerja di syarikat pelancongan di Kampung Latah Permai. Gelagatnya menghiburkan penduduk kampung dan pelancong. Satu hari, kampung itu dilanda sindrom 'melatah' dan menjadi tidak terkawal.

programme.desc: Kelas Belakang

programme.title: Duyung

programme.title: Sejenis Raya Senariounion
programme.desc: Kumpulan lawak paling diminati awal tahun 2000 kini Kembali dalam satu rancangan sketsa sempena Syawal. Saksikan Senario berkumpul dan mempersembahkan sketsa sambil menyanyi lagu-lagu popular Senario.

programme.title: Syif Malam Raya
programme.desc: Di malam Hari Raya, empat sahabat kembali ke kampung halaman mereka. Perkara pelik mula berlaku sebaik saja mereka tiba ke kampung yang dikatakan dihantui 'pocong', dikenali sebagai hantu selubung.

programme.title: Kelas Belakang - Trailer
programme.desc: Akan datang di Astro Citra. Demi membuktikan dirinya, seorang pelajar cemerlang mengambil risiko mengajar kelas paling teruk, tetapi akibat satu tindakan masa depan dia bakal hancur...

programme.title: Undangan Kuning
programme.desc: There is a village in Banyumas where the sense of community, cooperation, and solidarity is still very strong. Mr. Mudrik created two different invitations, one red and one yellow. He intended to distinguish between special guests

programme.title: Orange Sticker
programme.desc: Nora is plagued by new fears, while Kevin and John try to piece together a missing-persons mystery.

programme.title: Cinema Verite: The Saga Of An American Family
programme.desc: Witness the birth of reality TV in the early 1970s with the Loud family in this ground-breaking HBO Original Movie.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali's Greatest Fight
programme.desc: An HBO Original film that looks at Muhammad Ali's historic Supreme Court battle from behind closed doors.

programme.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War
programme.desc: The story before Snow White: During the war between two queens, the huntsman must vanquish the evil queen before her wickedness rules for eternity.

programme.title: Einstein And Eddington
programme.desc: A story about the unlikely partnership during World War I between a young British scientist named Arthur Eddington and the brilliant physicist, Albert Einstein.

programme.title: Ángel Rodríguez
programme.desc: An HBO Original Movie, Angel Rodriguez tells the tale of Nicole, a social worker, and her relationship with Angel, a bright but troubled inner-city teen.

programme.title: In The Heights
programme.desc: Film version of the Broadway musical, In the Heights. Usnavi, a New York bodega owner, saves every penny every day as he imagines and sings about a better life.

programme.title: Friendship
programme.desc: A suburban dad (Tim Robinson) struggles to keep his job and marriage afloat while relentlessly pursuing a friendship with his charming new neighbor, Brian (Paul Rudd).

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: Cady is a hit with the A-list clique at her new school, until she makes the mistake of falling for one of their ex-boyfriends.

programme.title: A Rising Star Shot Down
programme.desc: A teen actress on the rise falls in with a dangerous crowd.

programme.title: Game Change
programme.desc: Adapted from the non-fiction book of the same name, this HBO Original Movie provides an insider's look at the 2008 US presidential election.

programme.title: Orange Sticker
programme.desc: Nora is plagued by new fears, while Kevin and John try to piece together a missing-persons mystery.

programme.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites
programme.desc: Experience the case that strikes at the core of Ed and Lorraine's mission and attacks the very heart of the Warren family... their daughter, Judy.

programme.title: Deadwood: The Movie
programme.desc: Set in 1876, when the richest gold strike in U.S. history drew a throng of restless misfits to an outlaw settlement in the Black Hills of South Dakota.

programme.title: The Leisure Class
programme.desc: The winning entry from HBO's Project Greenlight about a man trying to marry into a wealthy family and his wild, unpredictable brother who could ruin everything.

programme.title: No Room At The Inn
programme.desc: A trip out of Miracle turns into a harrowing ordeal for Reverend Matt and his unresponsive wife, Mary.

programme.title: Bodyguard Of Lies
programme.desc: A hard-hitting look at how the Afghanistan War was sold to the public - and the deception that fueled it for two decades.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: Cady is a hit with the A-list clique at her new school, until she makes the mistake of falling for one of their ex-boyfriends.

programme.title: Hemingway & Gellhorn
programme.desc: This HBO drama recounts the tumultuous relationship between Ernest Hemingway and war correspondent Martha Gellhorn.

programme.title: Sugar
programme.desc: An HBO Original film of a baseball pitcher who struggles to pull his family out of poverty.

programme.title: King Richard
programme.desc: King Richard follows the journey of Richard Williams, an undeterred father instrumental in raising two of the most extraordinarily gifted athletes of all time, who will end up changing the sport of tennis forever.

programme.title: The Naked Gun
programme.desc: Following in his father's footsteps, Lt. Frank Drebin Jr. has the particular set of skills... to lead Police Squad and save the world!

programme.title: Shutter Island
programme.desc: Up-and-coming U.S. marshal Teddy Daniels is assigned to investigate the disappearance of a patient from Boston's Shutter Island Ashecliffe Hospital.

programme.title: Episode 8
programme.desc: A comedy set on a college campus centering on an author's (Steve Carell) complicated relationship with his daughter (Charly Clive).

programme.title: Episode 6
programme.desc: Explores the madness of the television world and the bravery of a tragic actress as she struggles to keep her career afloat while balancing her personal life

programme.title: Episode 3
programme.desc: Euphoria follows a group of high school students as they navigate love and friendships in a world of drugs, sex, trauma, and social media.

programme.title: No Room At The Inn
programme.desc: A trip out of Miracle turns into a harrowing ordeal for Reverend Matt and his unresponsive wife, Mary.
